name: Doctor Strange
description: Dr. Stephen Vincent Strange was a brilliant but arrogant neurosurgeon whose career was destroyed when a car accident shattered his hands. Seeking healing in Kamar-Taj, he instead discovered the Mystic Arts and became the Sorcerer Supreme, Earth's primary defender against magical and interdimensional threats. Strange guards the Time Stone, navigates the Multiverse, and has faced Dormammu, Nightmare, and corrupted variants of himself. His supreme intellect combined with reality-bending magic make him one of the most powerful beings in existence.
